name: Canned Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the tomatoes and plunge them into cold water.
2. Peel and core the tomatoes.
3. Cut or mash the tomatoes.
4. Add 1/2 tsp of pickling salt, 1/8 tsp of black pepper, 1/2 tsp of sugar, and 2 tbsp of lemon juice to sterilized quart jars for each quart of tomatoes.
5. Add the prepared tomatoes to the jars.
6. Do not add any additional liquid.
7. Process in a boiling water bath for 45 minutes for quarts or 35 minutes for pints.
Origin: Adapted from Jean Pares Preserves book. Shared by Sharon Stevens, Sept/96.
